title: EventInstance
description: A versioned event instance within an Event Thread. Supports reversible and versioned identity relationships.

canonical_event_instance_id.description: Stable identifier for this specific event instance version.

event_thread_ref.description: Reference to the Event Thread this instance belongs to.

relationship_to_thread.description: How this instance relates to its thread. Unresolved identities must NOT be auto-merged.

supersedes.description: Reference to an earlier event_instance_id that this instance supersedes, if applicable.

superseded_by.description: Reference to a later event_instance_id that supersedes this instance, if applicable.

instance_data.description: The event data fields for this version.
